string.text: Hailing from H.I.D.E 404. Active leader, the Elite Doll Klukai has arrived. It's been a while, Commander.
What took you so long? I've been waiting for a while.
Klukai, what's the deal with that motorbike?
As I use them so often during missions, I've grown fond of motorbikes without even realizing it. I guess that's something I've gained unexpectedly.
Want to go for a joyride, Commander? I found something good on the last mission and installed it on the motorbike. Let's try it out.
Okay Klukai, please head back to base. I will handle it from here.
You're looking at the other Dolls again, Commander... Is it because I'm not powerful enough? Go ahead and look around, Commander. You'll realize who is the best one soon enough.
